The supprt team functions at an acceptable level without excelling or failing. Standard 5 minute wait times generic helpful responses and adequate resolution for routine queries. Not the kind of support that creates advocates but not the kind that drives churn either.
Standard care. Nothing stands out here.

The support team functions at an acceptable level without excelling or failing. Standard 10 minute wait times generic helpful responses and adequate resolution for routine queries. Not the kind of support that creates advocates but not the kind that drives churn either.

supprt resolved the immediate query professionally in 60 minutes but the billing system continues to generate wrong charges of Rs 299. Human supprt good automated billing broken. The professionalism shown by the support team was commendable overall.

The support quality has degraded dramatically. Previously I could get issues resolved on first call but now every interaction involves long hold times scripted responses and promises of callbacks that never materialize. They stopped caring about customers. The support experience has been consistent across multiple interactions.

I waited 30 minutes on hold only to be told my complaint needs escalation and someone will call back. No one ever called. This happened three separate times. The support system seems designed to exhaust custmers into giving up. I appreciate agents who take ownership rather than passing the buck.

Average care but pricing is good.

Customer support is average overall. They eventually resolve issues but the process involves standard wait times of 90 minutes and agents follow scripts rigidly. Not terrible but not the proactive helpful service that builds loyalty. Just standard industry practice. This level of support makes a real difference for customer retention.
Helpful agent fixed billing issue quickly.
Average hold time and average resolution.

The support agent was genuinely helpful about my billing complaint resolving the overcharge quickly. However the internet speed in Salem remains slow at 300 Mbps. Good support but bad infrastructure. The support experience has been consistent across multiple interactions.
Excellent care team and speed issue fixed.
Support okay. Got the job done eventually.
Support just reads scripts. No real help.

I appreciate that the support agent today did not just fix the immediate problem but also identified a plan mismatch that was costing me extra. Proactive consultative support that saves custmers money builds genuine loyalty. The professionalism shown by the support team was commendable overall.

The twenty-four hour availability of support is a major differentiator. I contacted them at midnight about an urgent roaming issue and got connected to a competent human agent within minutes who resolved the problem before my morning flight. The support experience has been consistent across multiple interactions.
Support adequate for my simple query.

I had a complex billing dispute requiring multiple interactions and the support team was professional patient and ultimately resolved it in my favor with a Rs 249 credit. Their willingness to listen and take ownership made all the difference. The resolution speed is what distinguishes good support from mediocre.

The chat supprt was outstanding today. I had a data pack issue and the agent identified the problem instantly and fixed it while I was still on chat. No hold time no transfers no frustration. Pure efficient problem solving in under 15 minutes.
Terrible support but billing fine and speed good in Mysore. The professionalism shown by the support team was commendable overall.
Support neutral but app works well.

Customer support is completely dysfunctional for my account issue. Despite 14 days of follow-ups with multiple agents each giving different information the problem remains unresolved. The support quality has clearly deteriorated over the past year. I wish all telecom operators trained their agents to this standard.

The support agent was genuinely helpful about my billing complaint resolving the overcharge quickly. However the internet speed in Ludhiana remains slow at 50 Mbps. Good support but bad infrastructure. This level of support makes a real difference for customer retention.
